item.title: Nektar Therapeutics / Rezpegaldesleukin (Rezpeg)
item.description:
• Summary: Nektar Therapeutics reported positive long-term data for rezpegaldesleukin (Rezpeg) in alopecia areata, supporting plans for Phase 3 trials. The drug demonstrated sustained hair regrowth in patients.
  • MoAs: Rezpegaldesleukin: PEGylated IL-2 cytokine agonist designed to selectively expand regulatory T cells (Tregs)
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive, STAT News, Endpoints News

item.title: AbbVie Psoriasis Campaign
item.description:
• Summary: AbbVie has launched a new marketing campaign called "Pso Done" for psoriasis, involving a cross-agency effort to raise awareness and promote treatment options.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
